name: Ease2pay N.V.
summary: Ease2pay N.V., an e-commerce company, provides e-fulfilment, returns logistics, and online payment services in the United Kingdom, the Netherlands, Germany, Italy, Switzerland, Spain, Poland, and France. The company offers fulfillment services, such as inbound, stock management, order picking, packaging, returns management, personalization, transport management, packaging management, marketplace integration services, and B2B services. It also provides outbound logistics from one central stock to clients; and full service solutions comprising implementation, development, design, Webshop management, customer support, project management, online marketing, conversion optimization, search engine marketing, and email marketing. In addition, the company offers content improvement, online payment, and business intelligence services. The company was formerly known as DOCDATA N.V. and changed its name to Ease2pay N.V. in February 2018. Ease2pay N.V. is headquartered in Waalwijk, the Netherlands. As of January 31, 2017, Ease2pay N.V. operates as a subsidiary of The Internet of Cars V.O.F.
